title: Project
text: Project A Project is a Main Development Object that defines the contents of an application or part of an application, and is used to control the build process. It is the starting point for all development and contains Reference Development Objects that refer to Main Development Objects. From a Project, you can create new Main Development Objects, define and generate deployable archive files. For more information, see Projects . Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: prj Main Development Object? Yes Part of: — Contains: Reference Development Object , Property Generalization: Main Development Object Specializations — Compilation output Uniface archive files ( .uar ) URI format: prj: ProjectName Specialization Project specializes Main Development Object in the following ways: It can contain Reference Development Objects. It does not have Code Containers. Project Properties Object Properties: Name Type Location Description Documentation Table 1. Project Properties Property Description Archive Name of the Uniface archive file. For example: MyApp.uar . Archive Readme Name of the Readme file to be included in the Uniface archive file. For example: Readme.html . Archive Version Release version of the archive file. Connectivity Path External Path Standard Path Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
